title: Paracaleana sullivanii
taxonomy: Paracaleana sullivanii is a species of orchid native to Australia. It belongs to the genus Paracaleana and the family Orchidaceae. The genus Paracaleana is a part of the subtribe Megastreptiinae, within the tribe Cranichideae. This classification indicates the evolutionary relationships between Paracaleana sullivanii and other orchid species. Further research may provide a more detailed understanding of its taxonomic classification.
